title: Moobloom Update
description: Adds different variations of mooblooms to your world!
body:
![Moobloom Update Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c17644869b6e4c7869e8d6245095fdd742cd2b6e.png)
### **The pack is both a resource pack and a data pack**

This pack adds 16 colors of Mooblooms to some biomes. Starting with version 1.21.5, the resource pack runs entirely on vanilla using a datapack. To install, drop the pack into the resourcepacks folder and datapacks folder of your world!

## Where to find
- Green: Desert
- Pink & Magenta: Cherry Grove & Flower Forest
- Yellow: Sunflower Plains & Flower Forest
- Black, Gray, Lightgray & Brown: Pale Garden
- All the rest can be found in Flower Forest

## Future plans
- Compatibility with Entity Model Features for a flower texture on top of the moobloom

## Terms of use

You may modify Moobloom Update pack for your own use, but not distribute it. You are still free to create add-ons for Moobloom Update pack, as long as you do not use the original original files and textures. Don't re-upload any copy of Moobloom Update pack.

## 

If you find any bug or have any other issues, please let me know
